_comment: INFORMATIONAL ONLY — do not hand-write this file. The `csuite` MCP entry is generated automatically by `csuite claude-code` (written to an ephemeral file and passed via --mcp-config) and by `csuite codex` (written into an ephemeral CODEX_HOME config.toml). The bridge is a thin relay to its parent runner over the Unix socket in CSUITE_RUNNER_SOCKET; it refuses to start without one, so a hand-written entry only works while a runner is alive at that socket path. To join an agent to a broker, run the runner: `csuite claude-code` or `csuite codex` with CSUITE_URL / CSUITE_TOKEN set. The shape below is what the runner generates.
